positive: A central, intricate mandala composed of stylized cosmic fauna and ethereal flora. The design features highly detailed silhouettes of bioluminescent deep-sea creatures (like jellyfish and anglerfish) intertwined with gracefully curving elements of exotic jungle vines, lunar phases, and crystalline star clusters. The overall style should be sophisticated linocut engraving meets celestial art deco illustration. Use a restricted color palette of deep sapphire blues, iridescent purples, aged gold, and stark creamy whites. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and scalable, designed for high-contrast apparel printing, ensuring clean, defined edges and strong visual impact. Minimal shading, maximum graphic detail. Vector illustration quality, clean lines, occult symmetry.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, watermark, text, letters, logo, signature, debris, smudge, excessive shading, photorealism, watercolor, crayon, blurry, poor anatomy, deformed, messy
